channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chipotle COO calls hiring one of the 'most painful processes'—so his AI bot 'Ava Cado' cut it from 12 days to 4
item.description: "At the end of the day, that applicant ends up working for a human," Jason Kidd said at the Fortune COO Summit. "So how far can we push it?"

item.title: Should you treat AI agents as colleagues? Fortune 500 executives can't settle the debate
item.description: Okta's COO named his agents and included them in business reviews. Lattice's CEO disagrees, and new research supports her view.

item.title: AI may already be adding hundreds of billions to the economy—without showing up in the data
item.description: A new policy brief suggests AI may be adding hundreds of billions to the global economy, but official statistics are not designed to capture it.

item.title: Growing evidence points to remote work as cause of Gen Z hiring crisis, New York Fed agrees
item.description: Graduates blame AI for job struggles, but the pandemic's most popular perk may be the real issue.
